---
title: "compiler.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\scripts\empire\compiler.py"
loc: 119
complexity: 15
logic_score: 1.25
style_score: 3.83
intel_score: 3.42
overall_score: 1.25
---

## Intent
The `compiler.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on EmpireCompiler, __init__, compile, generate_boilerplate. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via EmpireCompiler, __init__, compile, generate_boilerplate. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `EmpireCompiler`
- `__init__`
- `compile`
- `generate_boilerplate`
